/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/TheBattles.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TheBattles.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TheBattles.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TheBattles.dir/src/Bot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TheBattles.dir/src/Map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TheBattles.dir/src/Storm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TheBattles.dir/src/BattlePass.cpp.o -o TheBattles  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
